error.model_not_support_img2img: Model '{name}' does not support image input (img2img). Capabilities: {capabilities}
error.model_not_support_inpainting: Model '{name}' does not support inpainting or image editing. Capabilities: {capabilities}
error.model_not_ready: Model '{name}'{version} is not ready. Please download it from the Download page first.
error.model_no_download_source: Model '{name}' has no valid download source
error.download_not_paused: Download task {id} not found or not paused
error.download_missing_metadata: Download task {id} is missing metadata required for resume
error.source_version_not_ready: Source version '{version}' is not ready, please download first
error.size_mismatch: Mask and image size mismatch. Image: {img_w}x{img_h}, Mask: {mask_w}x{mask_h}
error.mlx_video_python_api_required: Video generation requires the mlx-video Python API to be importable (CLI fallback removed to avoid silent quality/behavior differences). Upgrade mlx-video or fix the venv. Import error: {detail}
error.mflux_model_profile_required: No dedicated mflux ModelConfig for model '{name}' (generic defaults are disabled). Add it to config_map in backend/engine/image/mflux_generation_backend.py.
